sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: After a lesson transitions to Completed state, the student sees a feedback form on the portal. The form accepts a star rating and free-text comments. Submitted feedback is stored on the lesson record.
sys_app_requirement.description: Provide a post-lesson feedback interface accessible to the student once a lesson record reaches the Completed state. The interface must allow the student to submit a numeric/star rating and free-text comments. Feedback is stored in the student_feedback field on the lesson record (x_german_lesson table).
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-004: Student Feedback Interface
